SMVDU Club CREATE ACCOUNT LOGIN Don't have an account ? Sign In with your University Ids University Email Password Login / Sign In SMVDU CLUBS Create an account Name Login Here ! LauncherActivity Enter email here Password here... set a string password enter your name... SIGN UP Use your University Ids 251233991079-0j7um5e015lk7pjiqrpjlod8pebr2h7i.apps.googleusercontent.com HomeActivity Home Dashboard Notifications TextView DASHBOARD HERE ! enter password re-enter password Forget Password ? LogOut By tapping "Sign Up" you accept our terms and conditions Clubs Events Notifications About Dashboard Clubs clubname here Name : About : Email : Akash kumar Chaurasiya Android developer akashchaure@gmail.com Discover a world of opportunities—engage with clubs, attend exciting events, and stay in the know with community updates! Hackathon registrations are now open! Gear up for an exciting challenge where you can innovate, collaborate, and compete with the best minds. Secure your spot today and be part of something amazing! Event not found Club not found Fest not found No new notifications Search events..."> Search clubs... Topics Event Details Join Club Events Organized Event Entry Number Registration Form Submit Registration Phone Number Department club_app_channel
Sign up successful! An error occurred Signing up… FCM Token: %s
1. ACCEPTANCE OF TERMS
By accessing and using the SMVDU Club App, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions.

2. USER ACCOUNTS
- You must provide accurate information when registering
- You are responsible for maintaining password confidentiality
- Your account must use your university email ID

3. USER CONDUCT
- You agree not to use the app for any illegal purposes
- You will not post inappropriate, offensive, or harmful content
- You will not impersonate others or misrepresent your identity

4. PRIVACY POLICY
- We collect personal information for account management
- Your data is protected according to our privacy practices
- We may use your information to improve our services

5. CLUB ACTIVITIES
- Event participation is subject to university policies
- Content posted in clubs must follow university guidelines

6. TERMINATION
- We reserve the right to terminate accounts violating these terms
- Users may delete their accounts at any time

7. CHANGES TO TERMS
- We may update these terms periodically
- Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance Please enter your name Please enter your email Please enter a password Please enter a valid email address Password must be at least 8 characters Passwords do not match Signing up… Terms and Conditions Accept Close An error occurred Google Sign-In failed Create Account Please Please enter your password Network error. Please check your connection. no user record user not found Email is not registered Authentication failed. Please try again. password is invalid wrong password auth credential is incorrect Incorrect email or password network Google Sign-In successful Sign in with Google Loading... No announcements available. No upcoming events found. " Go and study for exams" More... Unnamed Club No description available. Share with Community What's on your mind? Share something interesting... Sharing your post... Share Post Cancel Anonymous User Prof. (Dr.) Pragati Kumar Club Category Back Category Logo Head Photo Head Name Head Designation No message available Read more...
